hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | python -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))"); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then if echo "$FILE" | grep -qiE "\.lua$"; then /c/tools/luacheck.exe --no-color "$FILE" 2>&1; RET=$?; if [ $RET -ge 2 ]; then exit 1; fi; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qiE "\.cea$"; then python C:/dev/longyin-cheats/scripts/lint_cea.py "$FILE" /c/tools/luacheck.exe 2>&1 || true; fi; fi'
